events.sourceNote: Modeled from 2025 USA Diving Winter Nationals synchro schedule; USA Nationals only, not National Qualifier.

scheduleNotes.text: v12 junior remap: moved Group A Boys Platform out of Friday/Group D mixed platform session; limited platform events to one per prelim session where possible; preserved same age/gender one-apparatus-per-day rule.

v13: Moved Group A Boys Platform from Aug. 2 to Friday July 31 so Group A athletes have additional rest before National Qualifier/USA Nationals practice and competition. Swapped Group B Girls Platform to Aug. 2 to maintain one platform event per prelim/final session.

schedule.entryProjectionSource: Junior + Senior National combined event timeline New (1).xlsx for juniors; 12.9 Detailed USAD Winter Nationals Schedule .pdf for qualifier/senior estimates.
schedule.revisionNote: v14: moved Group D Girls 3m prelim/final from Thu Jul 30 to Sun Aug 2 to avoid same-session 3m junior board-set conflict; junior prelim sessions should not stack same-apparatus events over 20 combined entries.
